resources.string: Please connect the device to unlock the translation function
Dear friend, it\'s great to meet you! Let me talk to you about what you have learned recently and what interesting things you have encountered! Strive to become your best friend.

1. After turning on the device, open the app and complete Bluetooth pairing and connection as prompted on the interface;\n2. After successful connection, you can directly wake up the AI assistant through preset voice commands for voice conversations and function operations.
One person clicks on the earphones,one person clicks on the phone to start the conversation
Click the button to start the conversation
One person clicks on the glasses,one person clicks on the phone to start the conversation
Tap the button on the phone to start the conversation.
One person clicks on the left earphone, and the other person clicks on the right earphone to start the conversation

1. Select my language and the other party\'s language.\n 2. Click the Invite friends to talk button and share the Invite link with your friends. \n 3. Your friends can open the Invite link to communicate in real time without any obstacles.
The base resource pack is being downloaded. Please wait…
Base pack not downloaded. Please download the offline translation base pack first
Bluetooth is turned off, please turn on Bluetooth and try again
Camera permission is required to scan QR codes
If you have any questions, feel free to ask me anytime.
Are you sure you want to clear the pairing records?
Please click on the + button above to add a device
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Are you sure you want to delete? This cannot be undone.
The Bluetooth connection of the system has reached the upper limit.Please go to Bluetooth settings of the system and disconnect the unnecessary device
The Bluetooth device has been disconnected. Please reconnect.
Please ensure that the devices are turned on and within communication range
Please ensure that this device is not connected to other phones at the same time
Do not operate other devices when connecting devices
\t\t\t\tThis action requires device restart to take effect. Apply now?
This authorization code is for %s earphones, please connect the correct Bluetooth earphones
The device name is too long. Please limit it to %1$d characters.
The Bluetooth device is disconnected, please reconnect
Connected, please do not move away from the device
Are you sure you want to discard all changes?

One person wears the earphones while the other uses the mobile phone.\n1.Single-click (double-click) on the earphones or click on the translation button on the mobile phone, and the input voice will be automatically translated, enabling direct conversation and communication.\n2.Click on the language switch button at the top to switch among 134 different languages.
The earbuds are disconnected from the case
Please connect the Bluetooth headset in the settings.
Please connect the earbuds, otherwise the translation feature cannot be used.
Entered SD card mode, classic headphones have been disconnected from the phone
1. Turn on Bluetooth on your phone and search for available devices;\n2. Find the glasses you want to pair and click to connect;\n3. Open the app, it will automatically scan and enter the homepage;
Feel free to ask me anything~
Exiting the wallpaper page will cancel the wallpaper settings
Bluetooth is turned off, please turn on Bluetooth and try again
Camera permission is required to scan QR codes
Please click on the + button above to add a device
The Bluetooth connection of the system has reached the upper limit.Please go to Bluetooth settings of the system and disconnect the unnecessary device
The Bluetooth device has been disconnected. Please reconnect.
Please ensure that the devices are turned on and within communication range
Please ensure that this device is not connected to other phones at the same time
Do not operate other devices when connecting devices
The device name is too long. Please limit it to %1$d characters.
The earbuds are disconnected from the case
Please connect the Bluetooth headset in the settings.
Please connect the earbuds, otherwise the translation feature cannot be used.
Entered SD card mode, classic headphones have been disconnected from the phone
Feel free to ask me anything~
The format of the Email is not correct
Exiting the wallpaper page will cancel the wallpaper settings
please input the problem or suggestion
Please describe the problem or suggestion you have encountered
The renaming requires manual un-pair and re-pair Bluetooth before it can take effect. Now go to Bluetooth Settings?
Please set a password of 6–12 characters, combination of letters and numbers
Image loading in progress Try again later
Are you sure you want to cancel your current account?
Are you sure you want to log out of your current account?
Follow the navigation for quick finding
Network signal is weak, please try again later.
The device is not bound. Please bind it according to the manual.
Bluetooth scanning and pairing require access to location information. Allow enabling location services?
This function requires access to your camera. Please grant camera permission to use this function normally.
This function requires access to your contacts. Please %1$s grant access to your contacts to use this function normally.
To use motion tracking and map-related functions, please grant Device Location Information permission to avoid any impact on usage.
To use motion tracking and map-related functions, please enable the phone\'s Location service to avoid any impact on usage.
This function requires access to your location information. Please %1$s grant location permission to use this function normally.
Go to Settings > App Management > LENSIQ > Permissions
Please grant permissions in system settings
Welcome to LENSIQ, please read the Privacy Policy and User Agreement first.
Align the QR code to scan
\t\tWhen searching for devices, the device will continue to ring for a while. Please make sure they are removed from both ears before continuing. Wearing them may cause discomfort due to loud volume.

1. Ensure both phone Bluetooth and device are turned on

2. When resetting the device to pair again, go to your phone's system settings, unpair the device from the Bluetooth list, then retry connecting.

3. If still unable to connect, clear pairing info on the device, turn system Bluetooth off and on, then reconnect.
Searching for devices… Please bring your phone close to the devices
Keep the device close to your phone during search, and do not close this page
Sms code length should be 6 numbers
Waiting for header to finish refreshing…
Failed to start scanning for devices, please try again later
Lift your finger to start sending
Lift your finger to cancel sending
Application update,new version %1$s, do you want to download the update?
Please keep Bluetooth and network on during the upload process. \n This process takes about 1 minutes.
Agree. Please grant relevant permissions in the system settings and click LENSIQ to authorize
please input the problem or suggestion
Please describe the problem or suggestion you have encountered
File storage permission denied. Please go to Settings to enable it

Communicate through headphones\n1. Click the speech button, and the earphones will automatically recognize and translate languages and play the voice.\n2. Tap the language switch button in the top-right corner. You can switch among 134 languages and exchange languages between both sides.
Two people each wear one headphones, keep your hands free to communicate.
Wears an earbud in each ear. Click the language button to start a conversation.
The renaming requires manual un-pair and re-pair Bluetooth before it can take effect. Now go to Bluetooth Settings?

Two-person communication (one person wears glasses) \n1. Tap (double-tap) the glasses or click the phone translation button to automatically translate both parties\' speech, enabling cross-language communication. \n2. Tap the language switch button at the top to switch between %1$s languages.

Two - person communication, one of them wears headphones.\n1. Single-click (double-click) the earphones or click the translation button on the mobile phone. It will automatically translate the voices of both sides, enabling cross - language communication.\n2. Click the language switch button at the top to switch among 134 languages.
Please take out the device and bring it close to the phone.
Please set a password of 6–12 characters, combination of letters and numbers
Select a language for translation after entering the text.
Resource pack not downloaded. Please download the offline translation %s resource pack first
Offline translation is not supported yet
Barcode scanning library for Android, using ZXing for decoding.
Image loading in progress Try again later
Are you sure you want to cancel your current account?
Are you sure you want to log out of your current account?
*After changing the name, you need to reconnect for the new name to take effect.
(If the device name is not displayed correctly, please re-pair and connect)
Follow the navigation for quick finding
Network signal is weak, please try again later.
Before using the function, please connect the device first
The device is not bound. Please bind it according to the manual.
This device does not support translation function
Bluetooth scanning and pairing require access to location information. Allow enabling location services?
This function requires access to your camera. Please %1$s grant camera permission to use this function normally.
This function requires access to your contacts. Please %1$s grant access to your contacts to use this function normally.
To use motion tracking and map-related functions, please grant Device Location Information permission to avoid any impact on usage.
To use motion tracking and map-related functions, please enable the phone\'s Location service to avoid any impact on usage.
This function requires access to your location information. Please %1$s grant location permission to use this function normally.
File storage permission is required to download language packs
For better experience, enable overlay permission
Go to Settings > App Management > Wook > Permissions
The application requires the following permissions to function properly
Recording permission: Used for recording audio
Modify audio settings permissions: Used to adjust audio settings.
Wake up lock permission: used to ensure that the application remains running in the background
File storage permission is required to use offline translation
Please grant permissions in system settings
One person wears earphone, the other uses a mobile phone.
One person wears the headset, and the other uses the phone. Tap the headset once, twice, or three times, or click the language button on the phone to start the conversation.
One holds phone, other wears glasses for translation, free talk.
One person wears the glasses, and the other holds the phone. Tap the glasses once, twice, or three times, or click the language button on the phone to start the conversation.
The format of the Email is not correct
One - click recording, real - time text conversion/translation.
1.Select Target Language.\n 2.Capture photo/choose from album - text detected & translated automatically.\n3.Tap image to view original/translation.
Please download the corresponding offline resource pack first
Welcome to Wook, please read the Privacy Policy and User Agreement first.
Are you sure you want to exit while recording?
Recording has exceeded 3 hours. Automatically saved to recordings list.
Please click the button below to start recording
Restoring to original state will remove all edits made to this photo
Align the QR code to scan
\t\tWhen searching for devices, the device will continue to ring for a while. Please make sure they are removed from both ears before continuing. Wearing them may cause discomfort due to loud volume.
The device will make a sound to help you find it
Music will play when the device is connected
Searching for devices… Please bring your phone close to the devices
Microphone operation is not allowed in game mode
LED settings are not allowed in non-Bluetooth mode

1. Enter the page and speak directly. Languages are automatically recognized, sentences segmented, and translation generated;\n2. Tap pause to stop recording; turn off playback to stop translated audio.
Sms code length should be 6 numbers
%s falsify area,\n Represents the height[%.1fdp] of drag at run time,\n It does not show anything.
The content view in SmartRefreshLayout is empty. Do you forget to add it in xml layout file?
Waiting for header to finish refreshing…
Failed to start scanning for devices, please try again later
Currently in simultaneous interpretation,\nare you sure you want to exit without saving?
Generating answer, please try again later~
Lift your finger to start sending
Lift your finger to cancel sending
To provide you with a better experience, please follow the instructions to complete the permission settings.
Tap to enter, ask anything anytime
To ensure successful reminders, please follow the tutorial to ensure the app runs in the background.
The set time has passed, so the reminder will not ring.
To push schedule reminders to you in real time, please turn on the message notification permission.
Select your phone model and follow the guide to enable background whitelist
Battery level below 50%. Please charge glasses before firmware upgrade.
This feature requires Bluetooth access. Please allow Bluetooth permission.
Your friend has turned off the camera
Click to connect to mobile Bluetooth for full functionality
Double-tap capture button, tap to stop recording
Triple-tap capture button, tap to stop recording
Long Press Capture Button, Single Click to Stop Recording
Double-tap capture button, tap to stop recording
Ensure your glasses are powered on and not connected to other devices
Are you sure you want to delete this schedule?
Searching for devices takes tens of seconds. During the search, please ensure:
2. The glasses are not paired with other phones and are in the pairing waiting interface
Please click the device to bind
Continuous Listening Mode has been disabled.
Continuous Listening Mode has been enabled.
Click the add button at the bottom right to add a new schedule
You can say Set a reminder for me to drink water at 5 PM today after waking up the voice assistant, and the reminder will go off at the specified time.
To ensure stable import speed, please temporarily disable Personal Hotspot on your phone.
Glasses battery is below 15%. Please charge the glasses before importing files.
First time use. Please go to [Authorization Page] to scan and complete authorization.
Congratulations on completing the guide and setup
1. Find the device named GlassS2-xxxx in Bluetooth settings\n2. Click the icon on the right of the name\n3. Select Ignore this device
Invite you to make a video call...
Invite you to make a voice call...
Waiting for the Other Party to Answer…
Are you sure you want to skip the basic operation guide?
You can restart the guide at any time in Mobile App - Home - Glasses Basic Operations.
Importing file. Please try again after finishing.
Recording in progress. Please try again after finishing.
Taking photo. Please try again after finishing.
Recording video. Please try again after finishing.
To provide accurate location services, we need to access your device\'s location permissions (latitude and longitude information). Your data will only be used for the current service. Allow access?
Please initiate the conversation at the glasses button
In order to use the software normally, please allow notifications
The indicator has blinked, next step
and select Bluetooth device [NEO-A1] to connect
The LED indicator blinks, entering Bluetooth pairing mode.
(If pairing fails and previously paired, delete device from Bluetooth list and re-add)\n\n2. Tap Bluetooth connection in app,
Select your device, wait for the device indicator to change from blinking to automatically turning off
To provide accurate schedule reminders, we need calendar access permission.

1. Confirm device battery level >50%.
2. Keep device connected during upgrade.
3. Do not exit this page.
4. Do not close the application
Please ignore the Bluetooth device first
The device may heat up during recording
Recording in progress, please try again later
For example: the meeting at 7 p.m. on Saturday
Unbinding will erase all data irreversibly. Reconnect requires factory reset.
Talk to the AI voice assistant after enabling
Tap to sync glasses media files
No media files available for sync
Upgrade cannot be canceled once started. Glasses will suspend data synchronization during the process.
Firmware upgrade failed. Please try again.
Indicator Light Flashes\nShow others you are capturing
Indicator Light Flashes\nShow others you are capturing
Do not exit this page during firmware upgrade
Enable cam & mic perms for audio - video trans.
Importing pictures requires Wi-Fi to be turned on. Please go to Settings to enable it.
Left earphone is ready, please speak
Right earphone is ready, please speak
1. Input text for instant translation (external paste supported);\n2. Supports %1$s languages. Tap translated content to copy.
Ensure that the application can still run actively after being returned to the background.

To avoid interruptions in the operation of applications by the mobile system, which may affect the use of Bluetooth shared networks, message notifications, and other functions, please complete the following settings:
Prevent the system from interrupting the operation of applications to save power.
Are you sure you want to delete all current translations?
Please enter the text to be translated.
When running in the background, you can slide to shrink the pop-up window. Please do not turn it off, otherwise the cross-app translation function will be affected.
Hold the phone in hand and speak near the microphone of the phone.
Click the language button on the phone to start the conversation.
Cannot select the same language for translation

1. Click the speaking button corresponding to the language you speak, and the phone will play the translated content externally.\n2. Click the language switch button at the top to switch among %1$s languages.
Both with indep. headphones, 1/2/3 clicks for real - time trsl., great for friends.
Each person wears a headset. Tap the headset to start the conversation.
Application update,new version %1$s, do you want to download the update?
Please keep Bluetooth and network on during the upload process. \n This process takes about 1 minutes.
Agree. Please grant relevant permissions in the system settings and click Wook to authorize
One - click recording, real - time text conversion/translation.
Do you want to end the recording?
Recording has exceeded 3 hours and has been automatically saved to the recording list.
No recordings yet, go ahead and record one to try~

Transcribe voices in real time \n1. Click the Recording button, select the recording language, and click the Confirm button to start recording. \n2. Enter the recording details page, click the edit button to edit the title and content.
One - click recording, real - time text conversion/translation.
Sorry, the Android camera encountered a problem. You may need to restart the device.
Place a barcode inside the viewfinder rectangle to scan it.
